stemHtml: Two positions at the same latitude are marked on a Polar Stereographic chart and the meridians at those positions converge with an angle of 30°. The effect of this convergence is that the true track of...

options.a: the rhumb line route between those two positions will change by 30°.
options.b: the rhumb line and great circle route between those two positions will differ by 30° at either position.
options.c: the great circle route between those two positions will change by 30 degrees of convergence Angle.
options.d: a straight line drawn between those two positions will change by 30°.
